headline: The Bull Case For GM (GM) Could Change Following New Battery And AI Initiatives In EV Strategy
summary: In recent days, General Motors has highlighted new battery initiatives, including a US$900 million Battery Cell Development Center and sodium-ion grid storage partnership, alongside expanded use of artificial intelligence and virtual engineering to shorten vehicle development times. Together, these moves suggest GM is working to cut electric vehicle costs, broaden into energy storage, and use AI to reshape how quickly it can refresh and launch products. We’ll now examine how GM’s push into...

headline: Exclusive-GM may ditch LFP batteries for future EVs
summary: General Motors may scrap plans to use a lower-cost, iron-based battery chemistry that many automakers are using to cut electric-vehicle costs, GM's ‌head of battery technology said.  The Detroit automaker had said it planned to develop lithium-iron phosphate, or ‌LFP, batteries for use in future EV models, and would begin making those batteries in late 2027 at a jointly owned plant in ​Tennessee.  But GM battery chief Kurt Kelty told Reuters that GM instead is focused on developing a different battery chemistry, lithium manganese-rich, or LMR, which the company has said costs about the same as LFP to make in the U.S., but can store more energy for the same weight and size.

raw.headline: Exclusive-GM may ditch LFP batteries for future EVs

But GM battery chief Kurt Kelty told Reuters that GM instead is focused on developing a different battery chemistry, lithium manganese-rich, or LMR, which the company has said costs about the same as LFP to make in the U.S., but can store more energy for the same weight and size.

headline: Expert Warning: America’s Grid Is So Far Behind, Blackouts Are Coming Even Without AI
summary: Dan Dreyfus, founder of Borneite Capital, warned on the All-In Podcast that America’s grid is in such poor shape that blackouts, when power is completely lost, and brownouts, when voltage is reduced, and electricity becomes less reliable, are coming from ordinary electrification alone. AI data centers are layering onto an existing problem. A Grid Frozen ... Expert Warning: America’s Grid Is So Far Behind, Blackouts Are Coming Even Without AI

headline: General Motors follows Ford's lead into the battery business

headline: Space ETFs: Diversified funds offer protection from volatility
summary: In the latest installment of Yahoo Finance's ETF Report, TMX VettaFi head of research Todd Rosenbluth outlines what SpaceX's (SPAX.PVT) imminent IPO could mean for space ETFs, broader market indexes, and investors' portfolios. SpaceX is expected to go public on the Nasdaq this Friday, June 12, under the ticker SPCX, with the space operator aiming to price its IPO at $135 per share.

headline: How The Narrative On General Motors (GM) Is Shifting With Mixed Analyst Targets And New Ventures
summary: General Motors' fair value estimate has been adjusted slightly higher, moving from US$93.92 to about US$94.81 per share, putting a finer point on what some analysts think the stock could be worth. That shift sits against a backdrop of mixed Street commentary, with some firms lifting targets and others trimming them as they reassess how GM's core production and newer business lines might feed into earnings and cash flow. As you read on, you will see how to track these changing views and what...
